task_description: Full redesign of praan.me from dark navy theme to light warm beige/sage editorial design. New typography (Playfair Display + DM Sans), new color palette, restructured homepage sections, and /founder page route.

verification.summary: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no pnpm install or next build possible. Verified via file content analysis: all imports resolve to existing files, prop interfaces match between components, CSS variables correctly mapped, backward-compatible aliases preserve existing pages. No test framework in project.
